title: Generate CSV dataset with 2000 synthetic records and link it to the project

requirements.text: Generate a CSV file containing 2000 synthetic records matching the jan_dhan_registry_advanced schema with columns: Citizen_ID (12-digit text), Income_Tier, Scheme_Eligibility, Scheme_Amount (number), Last_Claim_Date (DD-MM-YYYY format), Region_Code, Account_Status (Active/Inactive), Aadhaar_Linked (TRUE/FALSE), Claim_Count (number). Ensure data variety includes different income tiers, multiple scheme types (Pension, Health, Education), various region codes, mix of Active/Inactive accounts, TRUE/FALSE Aadhaar linkage status, and claim counts ranging from 0 to 5.

quotes: yes generate csv file and link it if you not did

acceptanceCriteria: Scheme_Amount values match realistic benefit amounts (e.g., 2000 for Pension, 5000 for Health)
Mix of Account_Status includes both Active and Inactive entries
Region_Code follows state-district format (e.g., MP-11, GJ-06, RJ-06)

requirements.text: Make the generated CSV file accessible as a downloadable static asset at frontend/public/assets/jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv so users can download the dataset directly from the application.

quotes: generate csv file and link it

acceptanceCriteria: CSV file is placed in frontend/public/assets/ directory
File is accessible via direct URL path
File name clearly indicates it contains 2000 registry records

requirements.text: Add a visible download link or button in the application UI (either in the admin dashboard or a dedicated section) that allows users to download the jan_dhan_registry_2000.csv dataset file.
acceptanceCriteria: Download link/button is clearly visible and labeled
Clicking the link initiates CSV file download
Link includes file size information if possible

constraints: CSV file must match the exact schema format provided: Citizen_ID, Income_Tier, Scheme_Eligibility, Scheme_Amount, Last_Claim_Date, Region_Code, Account_Status, Aadhaar_Linked, Claim_Count
Date format must be DD-MM-YYYY to match existing sample data format
All Citizen_IDs must be unique 12-digit numbers
nonGoals: Implementing CSV import functionality into the backend (already planned separately)
Creating a CSV upload interface for users
